_comment: Inline policy `AwsHealthQueueReader` attached to the portal IRSA role `portal-inventory-irsa` (arn:aws:iam::444455556666:role/portal-inventory-irsa). Grants ONLY the three SQS read/delete actions the portal needs to poll and drain the AWS Health queue (lib/aws-health.ts -> pollAwsHealthQueue / syncAwsHealthEvents). Scoped to the single queue ARN (least privilege, req 3.6). Applied with: aws iam put-role-policy --role-name portal-inventory-irsa --policy-name AwsHealthQueueReader --policy-document file://ops/aws-health-queue-reader-policy.json (put-role-policy overwrites -> idempotent).
